case_title: POON, GEORGE vs. SANCHEZ, ZORBEDA DBA VARIEDADES SANCHEZ et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF POON, GEORGE COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-23-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POON, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ZORBEDA DBA VARIEDADES SANCHEZ DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
DEPT 01. JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK. REPORTER:BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ZORBEDA DBA VARIEDADES SANCHEZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3214 24TH ST, STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PROVIDED DEFT MAKES PAYMENTS (SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS). IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY, PLTF MAY SEEK EX PARTE ORDER TO LIFT STAY & HAVE JDMT FOR ALL RENTS & DAMAGES STILL OWING.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
